div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in Switzerland (Wilson)
div.p: 61. Your 58, July 16, 10 a.m. League’s circular letter No. 29 transmitted with Legation’s despatch No. 1178, of April 2, 1927,Neither printed; Legation’s despatch No. 1178 was dated April 13, 1927. was mimeographed unsigned document in which even the space for the name of the invited Government was left blank. Such a blank circular form can in no way be considered an invitation to any diplomatic conference.

You are therefore requested, in reply to League’s communication of June 27, 1927,Not printed. which has not yet been received by the Department, to invite the attention of the Secretariat to the fact that this Government has received no invitation to the Conference referred to in your telegram.
